research.status_summary: Actively operating and hiring — Stigg is a post-Series-A Israeli startup (~48 employees, Tel Aviv HQ) with no signs of layoffs, acquisition, or pause; open roles in Engineering, Marketing, and Sales are at 12-month highs.
research.hiring_policy: No explicit visa sponsorship or EOR policy is publicly stated; the careers page notes hybrid flexibility ('whether you work from home or join us in the office'), suggesting some remote tolerance, but the company is Israel-headquartered and appears to hire primarily locally.
recent_news: Stigg sponsored the HumanX 2026 AI conference (San Francisco, Apr 6–9, 2026), signaling active GTM push into the US AI market.
Open headcount in Engineering, Marketing, and Sales are all at their highest levels in the past 12 months as of mid-2026 (ZoomInfo signal).
Total funding reported at ~$21–24M (Seed + Series A Dec 2024 led by Red Dot Capital); no new funding round announced in 2026 — company appears to be deploying Series A capital.
research.growth_signal: Post-Series-A with ~48 employees and growing hiring across all departments, managing billions of API calls and tens of millions of monthly subscriptions for enterprise customers including Miro, Webflow, PagerDuty, and AI21 Labs.
research.fit_for_lior: Stigg sits at the intersection of AI product monetization and developer tooling — a Product Analyst or Vibe Coder who understands AI-native pricing models (usage-based, credit-based, outcome-based) could contribute directly to Stigg's core product and GTM, making it a niche but genuine fit for her product/AI thread.
